title: "In Every Thing Give Thanks" I Thessalonians 5:18

notes.introduction: An exposition of 1 Thessalonians 5:18 on the command to give thanks in everything as the will of God, set within a Wednesday night series on walking worthy and pleasing God. Draws on Psalm 100, Ephesians 5:18-20, Philippians 1:12, and Philippians 2:13-15 to address the conditions and scope of thankfulness for believers.

sections.heading: Psalm 100 on Thanksgiving and God's Goodness
Ephesians 5 on Being Filled with the Spirit
How Believers Are Instructed to Behave
What God Informs Us of in the Verse
Philippians 2 on Murmuring and God's Enabling
